name: SemiAnalysis Cover Style
note: The evolving definition of the SA article-image style. The prompt-smith reads this to write on-style prompts for every lane. Harden it by starring keepers in the lab, then folding what they have in common back into `styleBlock`/`palette`/`avoid`.

directions.A: Dotted Old Master — classical/allegorical compositions in a dot-screen halftone style, brand-tinted. Subject mapped to an allegory (e.g. capital→trinity, silicon→forge).
directions.B: Style-faithful — subject stated plainly; the look (dotted old-school painting + halftone + painterly light) carries it. No allegory required. Akash's lean.

styleBlock: dotted old school painting, vintage lithograph halftone texture, muted colors, soft painterly light

options.brand-tint: SA amber/blue over ink + cream — our identity.
options.vintage-litho: Bobo's original blue/cream vintage lithograph palette (closest to the source look).

moodboards.note: Midjourney-only --profile codes. Retire these once we seed an SA-owned moodboard from keepers.

avoid: generated text / lettering in the image (titles are added later, never rendered by the model)
photoreal exec scenes, cartoon mascots, busy sci-fi renders, mandala art (the old inconsistent cover grab-bag)
period/antique imagery creeping into MODERN subjects — datacenters/offices need firm modern wording or the oil-painting look drifts vintage
notes: Greek/classical subject matter is NOT required — dots + palette + painterly light carry the style.
The moodboards pull hard toward the look on their own; less style vocabulary = closer to the source.
MJ tuning: --s 400 if dots come out weak, --s 150 if compositions get chaotic.

beats.note: Recurring SA article themes → a subject seed the prompt-smith can build from.
beats.datacenter-power: vast datacenter halls, transformers and cooling, electrical grid tension
beats.capital-trinity: capital and compute as intertwined forces; scale, concentration, flows of money into silicon
beats.financials-ipo: markets, tickers, a company crossing a threshold; ascent and scrutiny
beats.silicon-packaging: wafers, dies, advanced packaging, the physical substrate of compute
beats.china-geopolitics: export controls, national compute, a divided technological world
beats.networking-interconnect: fabrics and links between machines; bandwidth as arteries
